title: Create multiple boards at once from templates
excerpt:
Hey, we have created multiple boards for our projects (5 atm, saved as template). So at the moment if we want to create a new project I’am creating a new folder in the workspace and add every single board via templates. 
…

posts.author: Julian1 (Julian Kist)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey, we have created multiple boards for our projects (5 atm, saved as template). So at the moment if we want to create a new project I’am creating a new folder in the workspace and add every single board via templates.

Is there a possibility to creat a new project all by it self via automation or a hole different way to copy the templates into a new project ?

Thanks in advance

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @Julian1

Welcome to the community! There is something called “workspace templates” where you can put in any number of boards and when creating a new project a folder will be created with all the boards from the template in it.

You should be able to find more info at https://apps.developer.monday.com/docs/workspace-templates.

posts.author: Julian1 (Julian Kist)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you very much. Works fine.

Just one problem left, i want to give every board in templates an new projectnumber while creating it. Is this possible ?

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
